what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a JPEG image asset named p-35 located in the design-source channel under recent-pitches; it stores addressing, blob, MIME, authorship, timestamp, and a short source note.
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite mime image/jpeg
Blob pointer is the only content payload reference
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of ledger fields
Markdown body contains a one-line source caption
Follows the channel-memory asset naming pattern image__<channel>_<path>.md
concerns: Zero width and height for an image record suggests missing or unextracted metadata
No descriptive caption, alt text, or tags
links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are recorded
source field is generic and does not identify the actual image subject
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a design pitch image that points to a blob but lacks dimensions, description, and relational links.
questions: Why are the image width and height 0?
What visual content does p-35 depict?
Where is blob b2:566e0e830d3f2a36e647af1808bd9fa6 physically stored?
What is the scope of the recent-pitches collection?
purpose_vs_actual: The body states it is 'SOURCE design ground-truth' for recent-pitches/p-35.jpg, and the file indeed acts as a source metadata record; however, it is missing expected image metadata such as dimensions.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register a recent design pitch image as an addressable, canonical source asset inside a channel-memory system.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, named, addressable metadata record that links a design pitch image to a content blob, an author session, and a creation timestamp within the design-source channel.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for a JPEG image named p-35 in the design-source/recent-pitches channel, referencing blob b2:566e0e830d3f2a36e647af1808bd9fa6 and recording zero width and height.
intention_for_embedding: To register a recent design pitch image as a discoverable, addressable source asset in the channel memory ledger.
